---
title: ""
---

### **About me**

I am currently a Resource Employee at [USC's Neuroimaging and Informatics Institute](https://www.ini.usc.edu/) and Research Assistant at Children's Hospital Los Angeles working on applying data science and engineering to process, manage, and analyze MRI (magnetic resonance imaging) brain data.

I graduated in the Neuroimaging and Informatics Master's Program ([NIIN](https://niin.usc.edu/about#program)) at the University of Southern California (USC) and I strive to contribute to advancing our understanding of the human brain through data science and biomedical imaging {{< fa brain >}}.

<br>



I began building my foundation in data science through my role as a programmer at the [Center for Addiction Medicine](https://www.mghaddictionmedicine.com) at Massachusetts General Hospital (MGH) from 2022 through 2024, under the supervision of Randi M. Shuster, PhD and Anne Eden Evins, MD, MPH, co-authoring [4 papers](/publications.qmd) on adolescent substance use and on mental health.
